members.label: Member Agents
members.source: Miami and South Florida REALTORS®, post-merger May 11, 2026

mlsRank.label: Largest MLS in the United States
mlsRank.phrase: third-largest MLS in the United States
mlsRank.source: T3 Sixty 2025 rankings (Bright MLS 101,000 and CRMLS 99,000 are larger), per MIAMI REALTORS / RWorld merger announcement April 2026

mlsAssociationOwned.label: MLS owned by a single U.S. Realtor association
mlsAssociationOwned.phrase: the largest MLS owned by a single U.S. Realtor association
mlsAssociationOwned.source: MIAMI REALTORS / RWorld merger announcement, April 2026 — do NOT phrase as 'largest local MLS in the world'; Bright MLS and CRMLS have more subscribers

urgScale.label: Founded · 3,500+ agents · 20 Florida offices

urgAgents.label: United Realty Group Agents
urgAgents.source: United Realty Group — urgfl.com (est. 2002, 20 Florida offices)

urgOffices.label: Florida Offices
urgOffices.source: United Realty Group internal office directory, supplied July 2026 (docs/sources/urg-office-directory-2026-07.jpg) — supersedes the earlier urgfl.com-sourced count of 20. Excludes URG's Greensboro, NC branch, which is not a Florida office.

networkVolume.label: 2025 Network Volume
networkVolume.source: MIAMI and RWorld members sold $69 billion in total real estate volume in 2025 — merger announcement, April 20, 2026 (docs/sources/miami-rworld-merger-announcement-2026-04-20.pdf)

memberComparison.label: More than double the next-largest U.S. local association
memberComparison.phrase: more than double the next-largest local association in the U.S. (43,000 members), larger than 47 state associations, and about 33 percent larger than the next largest in the world
memberComparison.source: MIAMI REALTORS / RWorld merger announcement, April 20, 2026 (docs/sources/miami-rworld-merger-announcement-2026-04-20.pdf)
